title: Attention Is All You Need
summary: Introduces the Transformer architecture and self-attention as a replacement for recurrent sequence models.

title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
authors: Kaiming He, Xiangyu Zhang, Shaoqing Ren, Jian Sun
summary: Presents residual connections that make very deep neural networks easier to optimize.

title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Shows that intermediate reasoning traces can improve large language model performance on multi-step tasks.

title: Segment Anything
summary: Introduces a promptable segmentation model and a large-scale dataset for image segmentation.

title: Diffusion Policy: Visuomotor Policy Learning via Action Diffusion
summary: Uses diffusion models to represent action distributions for visuomotor policy learning.

title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
summary: Studies scaling language models and evaluates in-context learning across many NLP tasks.
